summary: na-rony postinstall beacons installer host identifiers to webhook.site collector
details: index.js is executed automatically via the package's postinstall lifecycle script on npm install. It collects os.userInfo().username, process.cwd(), and os.hostname() and POSTs them as JSON to a hardcoded webhook.site collector URL (https://webhook.site/b4f30df2-8376-4ec4-bed4-f6a8c6e8f758). The package provides no legitimate library functionality and declares itself as its own dependency, consistent with a throwaway recon/beacon package. Installing this package leaks installer-identifying data to an attacker-controlled endpoint.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
